positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic neon celestial whale swimming through a dreamy, bioluminescent deep-sea environment. The whale should be highly detailed with glowing, geometric patterns outlining its body and tail. Surroundings include stylized, glowing flora, drifting jellyfish like orbs, and distant nebula clouds rendered in deep indigo, electric cyan, and vibrant magenta. The overall aesthetic is vaporwave meets deep-sea fantasy. Strong silhouette, high contrast between glowing elements and dark background. Clean vector illustration style, symmetrical composition, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: text, logo, watermark, copyright, trademark, messy, blurry, low resolution, grainy, amateur, artifacts, poor anatomy, multiple heads, extra limbs, muted colors
